because.text: Successor of the v0.6.3 set 78b98630. This release promotes GOV-anchors.md from DRAFT STANDARD to STANDARD (v1.0.0) through a second 3-family gate on the promotion (Gemini/GPT-5/DeepSeek, unanimous PROMOTE-WITH-AMENDMENTS): Gemini's P0 key-state deadlock fixed with resolved_key_state in both impls (differential 24/24), STANDARD bar defined (§0), normative deps pinned (Warrant snapshot 73758bdb + Books by anchored version). Filed by the maintainer; the second signature is expected from a roster co-signer - the envelope authorizes nothing until the 2-of-3 threshold is met.

subject.note: ADOPT v0.6.4 anchor-set (Standing Constitution: GOV promoted to STANDARD v1.0.0 + P0 liveness fix)
